mapper.sql: TPDWP.ID, TPDWP.CREATE_BY, TPDWP.CREATE_BY_NAME, TPDWP.CREATE_TIME, TPDWP.UPDATE_BY, TPDWP.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TPDWP.UPDATE_TIME, TPDWP.ODD_TYPE, TPDWP.WORK_DEPT_ID, TPDWP.WORK_DEPT_NAME, TPDWP.MAC_TYPE_CODE, TPDWP.MAC_TYPE_NAME, TPDWP.MAC_NO, TPDWP.ODD_USER_IDS, TPDWP.MAC_AMOUNT, TPDWP.WORKER_AMOUNT, TPDWP.WORK_CONTENT, TPDWP.WORK_DURATION, TPDWP.WORK_HOURS, TPDWP.CONFIRM_BY, TPDWP.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, TPDWP.CONFIRM_TIME, TPDWP.FIRST_APPROVE_BY, TPDWP.FIRST_APPROVE_BY_NAME, TPDWP.FIRST_APPROVE_TIME, TPDWP.SECOND_APPROVE_BY, TPDWP.SECOND_APPROVE_BY_NAME, TPDWP.SECOND_APPROVE_TIME, TPDWP.THIRD_APPROVE_BY, TPDWP.THIRD_APPROVE_BY_NAME, TPDWP.THIRD_APPROVE_TIME, TPDWP.ABANDONED_BY, TPDWP.ABANDONED_BY_NAME, TPDWP.ABANDONED_TIME, TPDWP.ABANDONED_REASON, TPDWP.STATUS, TPDWP.REMARK, TPDWP.CREATE_FROM_DEPT, TPDWP.CREATE_FROM_DEPT_NAME, TPDWP.MAC_ID, TPDWP.IS_REJECT, TPDWP.ODD_PLAN_NO, TPDWP.REJECT_BY, TPDWP.REJECT_BY_NAME, TPDWP.REJECT_TIME, TPDWP.REJECT_REASON, CLASS_TYPE, CLASS_DATE, TPDWP.ODD_WORK_TYPE_CODE, TPDWP.ODD_WORK_TYPE_NAME
mapper.select: SELECT T4.OPERATE_ID,T4.OPERATE_TYPE,T4.CREATE_BY_NAME,T4.CREATE_TIME, ( CASE WHEN T4.OPERATE_TYPE = '修改' OR T4.OPERATE_TYPE = '一级审核' THEN (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_ODD_TYPE != T4.AFTER_ODD_TYPE THEN '零工类型由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_ODD_TYPE)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_ODD_TYPE)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_WORK_DEPT_NAME != T4.AFTER_WORK_DEPT_NAME THEN '作业部门由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_WORK_DEPT_NAME)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_WORK_DEPT_NAME)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_MAC_TYPE_NAME != T4.AFTER_MAC_TYPE_NAME THEN '机械类型由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_MAC_TYPE_NAME)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_MAC_TYPE_NAME)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_MAC_NO != T4.AFTER_MAC_NO THEN '机械编号由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_MAC_NO)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_MAC_NO)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_MAC_AMOUNT != T4.AFTER_MAC_AMOUNT THEN '机械数量由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_MAC_AMOUNT)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_MAC_AMOUNT)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_WORKER_AMOUNT != T4.AFTER_WORKER_AMOUNT THEN '人员数量由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_WORKER_AMOUNT)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_WORKER_AMOUNT)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_WORK_CONTENT != T4.AFTER_WORK_CONTENT THEN '作业内容由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_WORK_CONTENT)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_WORK_CONTENT)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_WORK_DURATION != T4.AFTER_WORK_DURATION THEN '作业总时长由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_WORK_DURATION)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_WORK_DURATION)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_WORK_HOURS != T4.AFTER_WORK_HOURS THEN '总工时由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_WORK_HOURS)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_WORK_HOURS)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_REMARK != T4.AFTER_REMARK THEN '备注由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_REMARK)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_REMARK)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_WORK_TIME != T4.AFTER_WORK_TIME THEN '作业时间由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_WORK_TIME)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_WORK_TIME)||'】;' ELSE '' END) || (CASE WHEN T4.BEFORE_HOUR_METER != T4.AFTER_HOUR_METER THEN '台时由【'||TO_CHAR(T4.BEFORE_HOUR_METER)||'】变更为【' ||TO_CHAR(T4.AFTER_HOUR_METER)||'】;' ELSE '' END) WHEN T4.OPERATE_TYPE = '驳回' THEN TO_CHAR(T4.OPERATE_TYPE)||': '||TO_CHAR(T4.REJECT_REASON) WHEN T4.OPERATE_TYPE = '作废' THEN TO_CHAR(T4.OPERATE_TYPE)||': '||TO_CHAR(T4.ABANDONED_REASON) ELSE TO_CHAR(T4.OPERATE_TYPE) END ) OPERATE_CONTENT FROM ( SELECT T3.OPERATE_ID,T3.OPERATE_TYPE,T3.CREATE_BY_NAME,T3.CREATE_TIME, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.ODD_TYPE,NULL)) BEFORE_ODD_TYPE, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.ODD_TYPE,NULL)) AFTER_ODD_TYPE, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.WORK_DEPT_NAME,NULL)) BEFORE_WORK_DEPT_NAME, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.WORK_DEPT_NAME,NULL)) AFTER_WORK_DEPT_NAME, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.MAC_TYPE_NAME,NULL)) BEFORE_MAC_TYPE_NAME, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.MAC_TYPE_NAME,NULL)) AFTER_MAC_TYPE_NAME, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.MAC_NO,NULL)) BEFORE_MAC_NO, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.MAC_NO,NULL)) AFTER_MAC_NO, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.MAC_AMOUNT,NULL)) BEFORE_MAC_AMOUNT, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.MAC_AMOUNT,NULL)) AFTER_MAC_AMOUNT, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.WORKER_AMOUNT,NULL)) BEFORE_WORKER_AMOUNT, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.WORKER_AMOUNT,NULL)) AFTER_WORKER_AMOUNT, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.WORK_CONTENT,NULL)) BEFORE_WORK_CONTENT, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.WORK_CONTENT,NULL)) AFTER_WORK_CONTENT, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.WORK_DURATION,NULL)) BEFORE_WORK_DURATION, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.WORK_DURATION,NULL)) AFTER_WORK_DURATION, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.WORK_HOURS,NULL)) BEFORE_WORK_HOURS, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.WORK_HOURS,NULL)) AFTER_WORK_HOURS, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.REMARK,NULL)) BEFORE_REMARK, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.REMARK,NULL)) AFTER_REMARK, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.WORK_TIME,NULL)) BEFORE_WORK_TIME, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.WORK_TIME,NULL)) AFTER_WORK_TIME, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.REJECT_REASON,NULL)) REJECT_REASON, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.ABANDONED_REASON,NULL)) ABANDONED_REASON, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'0',T3.HOUR_METER,NULL)) BEFORE_HOUR_METER, MIN(DECODE(T3.LOG_TYPE,'1',T3.HOUR_METER,NULL)) AFTER_HOUR_METER FROM ( SELECT T1.ID,T1.CREATE_BY_NAME,T1.CREATE_TIME,T1.OPERATE_ID,T1.OPERATE_TYPE, DECODE(T1.ODD_TYPE,'1','机械零工','2','人员零工','') AS ODD_TYPE,T1.ODD_PLAN_NO, T1.WORK_DEPT_NAME,T1.MAC_TYPE_NAME,T1.MAC_NO,T1.MAC_AMOUNT,T1.WORKER_AMOUNT, T1.WORK_CONTENT,T1.WORK_DURATION,T1.WORK_HOURS,T1.REMARK, LISTAGG(TO_CHAR(T2.REPORT_START_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') || '~' || TO_CHAR(T2.REPORT_END_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'),', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T2.REPORT_START_TIME) AS WORK_TIME, LISTAGG(T2.HOUR_METER_START || '~' || T2.HOUR_METER_END,', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T2.HOUR_METER_START) AS HOUR_METER, T1.LOG_TYPE, T1.REJECT_REASON, T1.ABANDONED_REASON FROM T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN_LOG T1 LEFT JOIN T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN_DETAIL_LOG T2 ON T1.ID = T2.PARENT_ID WHERE T1.ODD_ID = #{id} GROUP BY T1.ID,T1.CREATE_BY_NAME,T1.CREATE_TIME,T1.OPERATE_ID,T1.OPERATE_TYPE, T1.ODD_TYPE,T1.ODD_PLAN_NO,T1.WORK_DEPT_NAME,T1.MAC_TYPE_NAME,T1.MAC_NO,T1.MAC_AMOUNT, T1.WORKER_AMOUNT,T1.WORK_CONTENT,T1.WORK_DURATION,T1.WORK_HOURS,T1.REMARK,T1.LOG_TYPE, T1.REJECT_REASON, T1.ABANDONED_REASON ) T3 GROUP BY T3.OPERATE_ID,T3.OPERATE_TYPE,T3.CREATE_BY_NAME,T3.CREATE_TIME ) T4 ORDER BY CREATE_TIME ASC

SELECT
FROM T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN TPDWP WHERE ODD_PLAN_NO IS NULL ORDER BY TPDWP.CREATE_TIME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN(ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, ODD_TYPE, WORK_DEPT_ID, WORK_DEPT_NAME, MAC_TYPE_CODE, MAC_TYPE_NAME, MAC_NO, ODD_USER_IDS, MAC_AMOUNT, WORKER_AMOUNT, WORK_CONTENT, WORK_DURATION, WORK_HOURS, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_FROM_DEPT, CREATE_FROM_DEPT_NAME, MAC_ID, IS_REJECT, ODD_PLAN_NO, CLASS_TYPE, CLASS_DATE, ODD_WORK_TYPE_CODE, ODD_WORK_TYPE_NAME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{reportUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reportUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportTime}, #{oddType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workDeptId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workDeptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oddUserIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macAmount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{workerAmount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{workContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workDuration, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workHours, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createFromDept, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createFromDeptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isReject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oddPlanNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classDate}, #{oddWorkTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oddWorkTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN SET UPDATE_BY = #{reportUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{reportUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{reportTime}, ODD_TYPE = #{oddType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_DEPT_ID = #{workDeptId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_DEPT_NAME = #{workDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_TYPE_CODE = #{macTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_TYPE_NAME = #{macTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_NO = #{macNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ODD_USER_IDS = #{oddUserIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_AMOUNT = #{macAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, WORKER_AMOUNT = #{workerAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, WORK_CONTENT = #{workContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_DURATION = #{workDuration,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, WORK_HOURS = #{workHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_ID = #{macId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_REJECT = #{isReject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLASS_TYPE = #{classType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLASS_DATE = #{classDate}, ODD_WORK_TYPE_CODE = #{oddWorkTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ODD_WORK_TYPE_NAME = #{oddWorkTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN SET CONFIRM_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONFIRM_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONFIRM_TIME = #{now}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN SET FIRST_APPROVE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, FIRST_APPROVE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FIRST_APPROVE_TIME = #{now}, ODD_TYPE = #{oddType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_DEPT_ID = #{workDeptId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_DEPT_NAME = #{workDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_TYPE_CODE = #{macTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_TYPE_NAME = #{macTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_NO = #{macNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_AMOUNT = #{macAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, WORKER_AMOUNT = #{workerAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, WORK_CONTENT = #{workContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_DURATION = #{workDuration,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, WORK_HOURS = #{workHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAC_ID = #{macId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ODD_USER_IDS = #{oddUserIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_REJECT = #{isReject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN SET CONFIRM_BY = null, CONFIRM_BY_NAME = null, CONFIRM_TIME = null, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN SET FIRST_APPROVE_BY = null, FIRST_APPROVE_BY_NAME = null, FIRST_APPROVE_TIME = null, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN SET IS_REJECT = #{isReject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REJECT_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, REJECT_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REJECT_TIME = #{now}, REJECT_REASON = #{rejectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN SET ABANDONED_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, ABANDONED_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ABANDONED_TIME = #{now}, ABANDONED_REASON = #{abandonedReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_REJECT = '0', STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT TPA.COMPANY_ID,TPA.COMPANY_NAME,TPA.DEPT_ID,TPA.DEPT_NAME, TPA.WORK_DATE,TPA.CLASS_CODE,TPA.CLASS_NAME, TPAU.ID,TPAU.USER_ID,TPAU.USER_NAME,TPAU.COEFFICIENT FROM T_PRD_ATTENDANCE TPA INNER JOIN T_PRD_ATTENDANCE_USER TPAU ON TPA.ID = TPAU.ATTENDANCE_ID INNER JOIN SYS_DEPT SD ON TPA.DEPT_ID = SD.ID INNER JOIN SYS_DEPT PSD ON SD.PARENT_ID = PSD.ID WHERE TPA.CLASS_CODE = #{classCode} AND TPA.WORK_DATE = #{workDate} AND PSD.DEPT_NO = #{deptNo} AND TPAU.ISWORK = '是' AND TPAU.COEFFICIENT > 0
SELECT ID AS DEPT_ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE DEPT_NO = #{deptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
